probes.name: membership-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms memberships + membership_plans + membership_renewals + passes tables + partial unique indexes exist.

probes.name: membership-renewal-backlog
probes.description: Active memberships with next_renewal_at more than 2 hours past-due. WARN > 20, CRIT > 100. Indicates ProcessMembershipRenewalJob stalled.

probes.name: membership-dunning-backlog
probes.description: Failed renewals with next_attempt_at more than 2 hours past-due. WARN > 20.

probes.name: membership-atomic-invoice-failure-rate
probes.description: Percentage of membership creates that rolled back due to invoice-create failure. Any non-zero rate is P1.

probes.name: membership-lapsed-surge
probes.description: Lapsed count in the last hour vs 7-day baseline. WARN when > 3x baseline. Indicates payment gateway outage or systemic issue.

probes.name: membership-chargeback-surge
probes.description: Chargeback count in the last hour vs 7-day baseline. CRIT when > 5x baseline. Indicates possible fraud attack.

probes.name: membership-pass-expiry-drift
probes.description: Passes past valid_until still not marked expired. WARN > 500. Indicates ExpireStalePassesJob stalled.

probes.name: membership-slot-headroom
probes.description: Tenants within 10% of their membership_slot cap. Product signal for upgrade CTA.
